creator: ecrist@secure-computing.net
text:
This patch is approved.  My apologies for the omission.


On Feb 26, 2010, at 00:00:24, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of net-mgmt/rackmonkey,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/144310 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/144310
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>

Eric Crist
